steps.page_title: Landing Page Redesign + New Project? — FreelanceHub

actions.text:
Hi Sarah,

Thank you for reaching out! I’m excited about the opportunity to work on the React Native companion app and help redesign your landing page. Could you please share more details about the project scope, desired timeline, and any specific design guidelines or features you have in mind? This will help me provide an accurate estimate and plan.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Jordan Mitchell
actions.reasoning: Typed a professional reply to Sarah Chen’s inquiry in the message textarea and clicked the Send button to deliver the response.
